title: I Built an AI Agent That Writes Documentation — Here's What I Learned
excerpt: I built contentGen — a custom VS Code agent that reads a Jira ticket, studies the Figma design, cross-references Confluence, and writes a finished help topic in under 30 minutes. Here's how it works and what building it taught me.
author: Mukesh Biswas

title: Cloud Documentation Best Practices for SaaS Teams
excerpt: How to build scalable, maintainable documentation systems for cloud-based products — from architecture to tooling to team workflows.
author: Mukesh Biswas

title: API Documentation Strategies That Developers Actually Use
excerpt: Practical strategies for writing API documentation that developers find, understand, and keep coming back to.
author: Mukesh Biswas

title: Cross-Functional Collaboration for Technical Writers
excerpt: How to work effectively with product managers, engineers, and designers to create documentation that ships on time and actually helps users.
author: Mukesh Biswas
